title: Monster Mash
description: *Now with Baby Variants* Monster Mash transforms Minecraft’s mobs into Vampires, Mummies, Lost Souls, Goblins, and more. Complete with eerie skins, haunting sounds, and mischievous charm.
body:
![Monster Mash](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e795546d526de9101b8137738efdeefd0668d6e.png)

# A Spooky Overhaul of Minecraft’s Classic Mobs

Turn your world into a haunted playground.

Monster Mash transforms familiar Minecraft mobs into eerie, character-filled creatures. blending horror and charm to create a fresh experience that feels both new and vanilla friendly.

Perfect for Halloween maps, adventure worlds or just making survival a little more… unsettling.

# What’s Been Reimagined

## Zombies

Zombies are now Vampires, stalking the night with custom skins and chilling new sounds

| Vampire | Baby Vampire |
| --- | --- |
| ![Vampire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e477b5876aae0372120f7563b4ba1ca3072c9ab.gif) | ![Baby Vampire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d8da52bcb5d72b302e65f7b28715fd050856fca.gif) |

Husks are now Ancient Mummies, wrapped in decay

| Mummy | Baby Mummy |
| --- | --- |
|  ![Mummy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8ee591ce57f89e5da72fa19d88a65b5eda8306c4.gif)| ![Baby Mummy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8bbeefc9ccd1e5f9821f8189a0a8e29eeed926b.gif) |

Drowneds are now Lost Souls, wandering endlessly with hollow whispers from the deep

| Lost Soul | Baby Lost Soul |
| --- | --- |
| ![Lost Soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9fa64fc2572808f9d26ca511fd98bc54133370fc.gif) | ![Baby Lost Soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7e77ec33ee5134c5dcf11a37ea8115e88b612fe.gif) |

# Skeletons

Skeletons are now Goblins, mischievous creatures brought to life with custom skins and quirky, eerie sounds

| Goblin | Nether Goblin | Dry Goblin |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ![Goblin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1444aafa2b8b2a352ccbecc8a4d70e184aea93f.gif) | ![Nether Goblin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5598d615f33c425af87dae5a283bddddf8e0d609.gif) | ![Dry Goblin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68736e4849ebbc2801181536e2128df89569d0b7.gif)  | 


| Cold Goblin | Swamp Goblin  |
| --- | --- |  
| ![Cold Goblin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fc15202d8291924d1ed07e7a17b5a584d7da696.gif) | ![Swamp Goblin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7df1989b770e673a27fe3bdd38f6037e8b8092c.gif) |

# Spiders and Creepers

Spiders and Creepers have been twisted into more unsettling forms, bringing a darker edge to familiar encounters. From cursed, crawling horrors to ghostly creepers, these mobs now feel right at home in the shadows.

| Creeper Ghost | Red Backed Spider | Cursed Spider |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ![Creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b23bf56040cf098322322eb7134626e1a42db6c.gif) | ![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1a351a866380880f86c3242ea9a227ddf34a58a7.gif) | ![Spider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1e1e04fc614a566c608a4907ffc65050672f716.gif) |
